channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 385,000 — Victoria Falls: 3-Bed Open-Plan Home with Garden Flatlet (Victoria Falls)
item.description: USD 385,000 — Victoria Falls. 5 beds, 3 baths. Victoria Falls: 3-Bed Open-Plan Home with Garden Flatlet. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
